MULTIPLAYERCARD-ZERO_SUM.title: Pressure On You
MULTIPLAYERCARD-ZERO_SUM.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
All teammates lose {DrainEnergy:energyIcons()} and add 1 [gold]Guilty[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold] for each teammate affected.
MULTIPLAYERCARD-YOU_SO_SELFISH.title: Why Are You So Selfish
MULTIPLAYERCARD-YOU_SO_SELFISH.descripti:
Gain {IfUpgraded:show:6|3} Strength.
All teammates lose 3 HP{IfUpgraded:show: and 3 Max HP|}.
